Title: Buffalo Nichols @ Columbia (MD) Art Center, Beyond the Blues concert 2/23/23
Description: Nothing but admiration for Buffalo Nichols and his original voice, deeply grounded and unapologetically growling in the "scratchy" roots of American Blues. His originals are really impactful, and his approach on the 2 covers here was masterful. I think I may have jumbled some of it out of set list order, but I hope it won't matter too much...

Title: Rock Paper Scissors Set List
Description: Peter Gabriel & Sting's Rock Paper Scissors Tour 2016 came to Washington DC on June 23, 2016. These videos follow the set list from that show in order. THEY ARE NOT FROM THE ACTUAL SHOW.They are MOSTLY live performances, MOSTLY not audience videos (except Gabriel's new song Love Can Heal). Sting covered a couple of Gabriel's songs, Gabriel covered If you love somebody, and they sang together on several songs. More details on the set list at https://medium.com/@dan2bit/set-list-rock-paper-scissors-june-23-2016-verizon-center-1def8f442e7e#.bpl84xun5
